# Peptides and You — Full Product Reference

> Premium pharmaceutical-grade peptides. Lab tested with Certificate of Analysis included.
> Website: https://peptidesandyou.com
> Location: Philippines
> Contact: info@peptidesandyou.com

---

## Company Overview

Peptides and You is a trusted supplier of pharmaceutical-grade peptides serving the Philippines and Southeast Asia. Every product is:
- Lyophilised powder vial format
- Third-party lab tested for identity and purity
- Supplied with Certificate of Analysis (COA)
- Available for secure, discreet shipping within PH and internationally

---

## Complete Product Catalog

### BPC-157 — Healing & Recovery
**Description:** BPC-157 is a naturally occurring peptide found in gastric juice. It accelerates healing in tendons, ligaments, muscles, and the gut lining. The fastest-acting recovery compound in its class.
**Benefits:** Accelerates tendon/ligament/muscle healing; repairs and protects the gut lining; reduces chronic inflammation and joint pain; promotes angiogenesis and tissue regeneration.
**Sizes & Prices:** 5mg — ₱1,800 | 10mg — ₱3,200
**Best For:** Injury recovery, gut health, joint pain, inflammation

### TB-500 — Healing & Recovery
**Description:** TB-500 is a fragment of Thymosin Beta-4 that travels systemically through the bloodstream, mobilising repair cells wherever damage exists. Reduces scar tissue, improves flexibility, and shortens recovery timelines.
**Benefits:** Systemic healing; reduces scar tissue; improves flexibility; shortens recovery time; ideal for chronic and post-surgical injuries.
**Sizes & Prices:** 2mg — ₱1,500 | 5mg — ₱2,000
**Best For:** Chronic injuries, post-surgery recovery, scar tissue

### GHK-Cu — Anti-Aging & Skin
**Description:** GHK-Cu is a copper-binding tripeptide that activates genes responsible for collagen and elastin production. Used in dermatology, anti-aging, and hair restoration. Levels drop sharply with age.
**Benefits:** Stimulates collagen/elastin; accelerates wound closure; reduces wrinkles and oxidative damage; promotes hair thickness.
**Sizes & Prices:** 50mg — ₱2,000 | 100mg — ₱3,000
**Best For:** Wrinkles, skin aging, hair loss, wound healing

### Retatrutide — Weight Management
**Description:** A triple receptor agonist (GLP-1, GIP, Glucagon). Clinical trials show up to 24% body weight reduction — exceeding bariatric surgery outcomes. Suppresses appetite, accelerates fat burning, resets metabolic function.
**Benefits:** Triple agonist; up to 24% weight loss; suppresses appetite; regulates blood sugar; exceeds surgery outcomes.
**Sizes & Prices:** 5mg — ₱3,500 | 10mg — ₱4,500 | 15mg — ₱6,500
**Best For:** Significant weight loss, appetite control, metabolic reset

### Wolverine Stack — Recovery Stack
**Description:** BPC-157 + TB-500 combined in a single vial. Local and systemic tissue repair working simultaneously. Cuts recovery timelines in half.
**Benefits:** Combines local + systemic healing; cuts recovery in half; #1 recovery stack.
**Sizes & Prices:** 10mg — ₱3,000 | 20mg — ₱5,000
**Best For:** Maximum recovery, athletes, post-surgery

### Epithalon — Longevity & Anti-Aging
**Description:** Synthetic tetrapeptide that activates telomerase — the enzyme maintaining protective caps on DNA strands. Studied for decades in longevity research.
**Benefits:** Activates telomerase; slows cellular aging; improves sleep and immune function; extends cellular lifespan.
**Sizes & Prices:** 10mg — ₱1,850
**Best For:** Longevity, cellular health, sleep quality, immune support

### AOD-9604 — Fat Loss & Metabolic
**Description:** Isolated fragment of human growth hormone that triggers fat breakdown (lipolysis) and blocks fat creation (lipogenesis). No impact on IGF-1 or blood sugar.
**Benefits:** Breaks down fat cells; prevents new fat creation; no hormonal side effects; targets stubborn visceral fat.
**Sizes & Prices:** 5mg — ₱2,000
**Best For:** Stubborn fat, body composition, safe fat loss

### Semax — Cognitive & Neuro
**Description:** Synthetic derivative of ACTH prescribed in Russian hospitals since the 1990s. Raises BDNF, sharpens focus, improves memory, and protects neurons.
**Benefits:** Raises BDNF; sharpens focus; improves memory; neuroprotective; decades of clinical use.
**Sizes & Prices:** 2mg — ₱1,750
**Best For:** Focus, memory, cognitive performance, brain protection

### Selank — Cognitive & Mood
**Description:** Synthetic analogue of tuftsin. Reduces anxiety via GABA and serotonin pathways without sedation. Enhances memory and learning speed.
**Benefits:** Reduces anxiety; stabilises mood; enhances memory; no dependency or withdrawal; synergistic with Semax.
**Sizes & Prices:** 5mg — ₱1,600
**Best For:** Anxiety relief, mood stability, mental clarity

### CJC-1295 — Growth Hormone
**Description:** GHRH analogue that triggers sustained, natural growth hormone release. Improves body composition, sleep quality, and recovery. Best stacked with Ipamorelin.
**Benefits:** Sustained GH release; improved body composition; better sleep; faster recovery.
**Sizes & Prices:** 2mg w/DAC — ₱2,000 | 5mg w/DAC — ₱2,500 | 2mg no DAC — ₱1,800
**Best For:** Growth hormone optimization, body composition, sleep

### Ipamorelin — Growth Hormone
**Description:** The cleanest GH secretagogue. No cortisol, prolactin, or hunger spikes. Produces 3-5x GH output when stacked with CJC-1295.
**Benefits:** Pure selective GH release; no side effects; better sleep; lean muscle; fat reduction.
**Sizes & Prices:** 2mg — ₱1,600 | 5mg — ₱2,000
**Best For:** Clean growth hormone release, muscle, recovery

### HGH (rHGH) — Hormonal & Performance
**Description:** Recombinant Human Growth Hormone — the gold standard. Drives cell regeneration, lean muscle, fat metabolism, and bone density. Pharmaceutical-grade with COA.
**Benefits:** Gold standard GH therapy; cell regeneration; lean muscle; fat metabolism; bone density.
**Sizes & Prices:** 10iu/vial — ₱1,470 | 15iu/vial — ₱1,900 | 20iu/vial — ₱2,400 | 1 Box (10×10iu) — ₱12,000
**Best For:** Growth hormone replacement, performance, anti-aging

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Are your products lab tested?**
A: Yes. Every product is third-party lab tested for identity and purity. Certificate of Analysis (COA) is supplied with every order.

**Q: What format are the products sold in?**
A: All products are lyophilised (freeze-dried) powder vials.

**Q: Do you ship internationally?**
A: Yes. We offer secure and discreet shipping within the Philippines and internationally.

**Q: How do I choose the right peptide?**
A: Take our 60-second Peptide Quiz at https://peptidesandyou.com/quiz for personalized recommendations based on your goals.

**Q: What payment methods do you accept?**
A: Contact us at info@peptidesandyou.com for current payment options. Payment processor integration is coming soon.

**Q: Do you have a blog or research resources?**
A: Our blog is launching soon at https://peptidesandyou.com/blog with in-depth articles on peptide science and protocols.

---

## Currency
All prices are in Philippine Peso (₱ / PHP).
